CONTENT.Career: Behrens made his professional debut for 1. FC Magdeburg in the first round of the 2019–20 DFB-Pokal on 10 August 2019, starting in the home match against Bundesliga club SC Freiburg.On 20 June 2022, Behrens joined Waldhof Mannheim on loan.On 12 May 2024, Darmstadt 98 announced that he and several other players will leave the club after this season.On 18 June 2024, Behrens signed with SC Preußen Münster.
CONTENT.External links: Morten Behrens at DFB (also available in German)Morten Behrens at kicker (in German)

SUMMARY: Morten Jens Behrens (born 1 April 1997) is a German professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for 2. Bundesliga club SC Preußen Münster.
